ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of the provider (e.g., JDK, Indexable set contributor) */,
  "provider_version" TEXT /* Version of the provider */,
  "provider_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the provider */,
  "provider_status" TEXT /* Status of the provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., Java, Python) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the build belongs to */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Build number */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date of the build */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "build_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the build in seconds */,
  "build_trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of trigger (e.g., manual, scheduled, commit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider the metric belongs to */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the metric belongs to */,
  "scanned_files" INTEGER /* Number of files scanned */,
  "scheduled_for_indexing" INTEGER /* Number of files scheduled for indexing */,
  "fully_indexed" INTEGER /* Number of files fully indexed */,
  "skipped_files" INTEGER /* Number of skipped files */,
  "scanning_time" REAL /* Time spent scanning */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time spent processing */,
  "indexing_time" REAL /* Time spent indexing */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "build_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the build in seconds */,
  "build_trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of trigger (e.g., manual, scheduled, commit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "contributor_type" TEXT /* Type of the contributor (e.g., module, Indexable set contributor) */,
  "contributor_version" TEXT /* Version of the contributor */,
  "contributor_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contributor */,
  "contributor_status" TEXT /* Status of the contributor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor the metric belongs to */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the metric belongs to */,
  "scanned_files" INTEGER /* Number of files scanned */,
  "scheduled_for_indexing" INTEGER /* Number of files scheduled for indexing */,
  "fully_indexed" INTEGER /* Number of files fully indexed */,
  "skipped_files" INTEGER /* Number of skipped files */,
  "scanning_time" REAL /* Time spent scanning */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time spent processing */,
  "indexing_time" REAL /* Time spent indexing */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "build_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the build in seconds */,
  "build_trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of trigger (e.g., manual, scheduled, commit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_metrics_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_metrics_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., scanned, scheduled for indexing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., scanned, indexed, skipped) */,
  "file_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was created */,
  "file_modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the build configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the build configuration */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "config_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the result belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_message" TEXT /* Message describing the test result */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test */,
  "test_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization metric */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build the metric belongs to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "utilization_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the resource utilized */,
  "resource_peak_utilization" REAL /* Peak utilization of the resource in percentage */,
  "resource_average_utilization" REAL /* Average utilization of the resource in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)
